summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job is explicitly not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive #78813 is routed to central security handling; already-closed #78901 is kept closed. The remaining open PRs are retained for maintainer/product review, author proof, or independent single-PR follow-up rather than closeout.
